steps.title: Interpret the input
steps.content: The function $f(t)$ gives the amount of money in the account $t$ years after the initial deposit. Therefore, $f(4)$ is the account amount after $4$ years.

steps.title: Interpret the output
steps.content: The statement says $f(4)$ is approximately $7{,}038.57$. That means the amount in the account after $4$ years is about $7{,}038.57$. It is the total balance, not the amount of increase.

steps.title: Choose the interpretation
steps.content: Choice B describes a repeated increase every $4$ years. Choice C describes an increase by $7{,}038.57$. Choice D describes a decrease. Choice A states the account amount after $4$ years. The answer is A.
